name: Aerial Ribbons
flavor: Weighted silk streamers the Acrobat conjures and whirls — equal parts spectacle, weapon, and safety line.

parryProfile.note: Flowing silk wraps and redirects an incoming blow beautifully — one of the best defensive weapons in the roster, matching the Acrobat's dodge-first identity. Its low damage (1d4, the same reach-tax the whip pays) is the deliberate tradeoff: the ribbons are a deflection and a safety line, not a killing weapon. Signature to the Acrobat.
